sentences.arabic: أَطْلَقَتِ الْبَلَدِيَّةُ خَطًّا جَدِيدًا لِلْحَافِلَاتِ يَرْبِطُ الْأَحْيَاءَ الْبَعِيدَةَ بِمَرْكَزِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Općina je pokrenula novu autobusku liniju koja povezuje udaljena naselja s centrom grada.
sentences.translationEn: The municipality launched a new bus route connecting outlying neighbourhoods to the city centre.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْخَطُّ الْجَدِيدُ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ مِنَ السَّاعَةِ السَّادِسَةِ صَبَاحًا حَتَّى مُنْتَصَفِ اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Nova linija radi cijeli dan, od šest ujutro do ponoći.
sentences.translationEn: The new route operates all day from six in the morning until midnight.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ السُّكَّانُ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا يُعَانُونَ مِنْ صُعُوبَةِ التَّنَقُّلِ قَبْلَ هَذَا الْخَطِّ.
sentences.translation: Stanovnici su rekli da su imali poteškoća s prevozom prije ove linije.
sentences.translationEn: Residents said they had struggled to get around before this route.

sentences.arabic: تَبْلُغُ تَكْلُفَةُ التَّذْكِرَةِ الْوَاحِدَةِ جُنَيْهًا وَاحِدًا فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Cijena jedne karte iznosi samo jedan dinar.
sentences.translationEn: A single ticket costs just one pound.

sentences.arabic: يَرَى الْخُبَرَاءُ أَنَّ وَسَائِلَ النَّقْلِ الْعَامَّةِ تُقَلِّلُ مِنَ الِازْدِحَامِ الْمُرُورِيِّ وَتُحَافِظُ عَلَى الْبِيئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci smatraju da javni prevoz smanjuje gužve u saobraćaju i čuva okoliš.
sentences.translationEn: Experts believe that public transport reduces traffic congestion and protects the environment.
